expected_state.ngap: NG Setup, Initial UE Message, and uplink/downlink NAS transport remain healthy against the declared Open5GS endpoint.
expected_state.release_state: UE context release remains clean and auditable after the verify window.
expected_state.pdu_session: The UE holds a declared IPv4 session on the internet DNN.
expected_state.gtpu: The tunnel and route are bound to the declared UE session.

observed_state.ngap: Registration completed against the declared Open5GS endpoint before the user-plane failure.
observed_state.release_state: UE context release completed after the failed ping verification window.
observed_state.pdu_session: The UE established a PDU session.
observed_state.gtpu: The tunnel exists, but user-plane reachability does not complete end to end.

diff_summary: Control-plane registration is already past the acceptance threshold.
PDU session exists, but user-plane forwarding does not produce a successful ping.
The failure is isolated to the declared user-plane path until proven otherwise.
operator_next_step: Inspect the user-plane route, tunnel binding, and forwarding evidence before retrying the same attach path.
